narrative:
Precinct Whitehouse Village A (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,255 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
